docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF S.F., HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY AS TO DEFENDANT WALTHER, RICHARD RUSSELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-21-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-19-2006, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-23-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE ENTRY OF JUDGMENT.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WALTHER, RICHARD RUSSELL
PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $200/MONTH BEGINNING ON 10/10/05 & ON THE 10TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-21-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-19-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 SETTLEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES FOR A TOTAL AMOUNT OF $3785.87. IF NO APPEARANCES CASE CONTINUED IN 6 MONTH INTERNALS UNTIL BALANCE PAID IN FULL, AT WHICH TIME, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING SENT TO WALTER, RICHARD RUSSELL RTURNED UNDELIVERED. SUBJECT MOVED.
RETURNED MAIL FROM POST OFFICE SENT TO RICHARD RUSSELL WALTHER.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGEMENT SENT TO WALTHER, RICHARD RUSSELL RETURNED UNDELIVERED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF S.F., HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WALTHER, RICHARD RUSSELL $2,950.00 PRINCIPAL, $35.87 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,985.87 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
